name: Golden Apricot Nog
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-2 quart saucepan, combine apricots, water, sugar, and cinnamon stick.
2. Bring to boil over high heat, then reduce heat and gently simmer until apricots are very tender when pierced, about 15 minutes. Discard the cinnamon stick.
3. Let apricots cool at least 1 hour. Add milk and vanilla; blend until smooth.
4. In a large bowl, mix in nutmeg and cover; chill at least 4 hours or until the next day.
5. In another clean bowl, beat egg whites with an electric mixer on high speed until frothy.
6. Gradually add remaining sugar and beat until stiff, moist peaks form. Set aside about half of the meringue.
7. Gently whisk the apricot mixture into the remaining meringue until smoothly blended. Stir in rum or brandy to taste and enough milk to achieve desired consistency.
8. Pour into serving bowl and float the reserved meringue on top of the liquid. Makes 3-1/2 quarts (18 servings, 6 oz each).
